words.def: a message that tells the particulars of an act or occurrence or course of events; presented in writing or drama or cinema or as a radio or television program
words.zh: n. 故事, 小說, 傳奇, 描述, 閱歷, 經歷, 層

words.def: an artifact designed to be played with
a category of things distinguished by some common characteristic or quality
words.zh: n. 種類, 方式, 品質, 態度, 舉止

words.def: earnest and conscientious activity intended to do or accomplish something
words.zh: n. 嘗試, 試驗, 審理, 審判

words.def: an artifact designed to be played with
words.zh: n. 玩具, 小玩藝兒, 小型的東西, 消遣
